zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Goodale於1568年8月16日出生在英國諾福爾可堂納姆 馬可特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale23歲，母親Elizabeth Taylor28歲。他於1590年11月8日與Joan Artys在英國素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Goodale于1568年8月16日出生在英国諾福爾可堂納姆 馬可特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale23岁，母亲Elizabeth Taylor28岁。他于1590年11月8日与Joan Artys在英国素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Goodale was born on 16 August 1568, in Downham Market, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Taylor, was 28. He married Joan Artys on 8 November 1590, in Dennington, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Goodale est né le 16 août 1568, à Downham Market, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Taylor, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Artys le 8 novembre 1590, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Goodale am 16. August 1568 in Downham Market, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Taylor 28. Er hat am 8. November 1590 in Dennington, Suffolk, England Joan Artys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Goodale è nato il il 16 agosto 1568 nel Downham Market, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Taylor, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Artys il 8 novembre 1590, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Goodaleが1568年8月16日にイギリスノーフォルクダウンハム マーケトで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Claypool Goodaleは23歳，母Elizabeth Taylorは28歳であった。1590年11月8日にイギリススフォルクデニントンでJoan Artysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Goodale(이)가 1568년 8월 16일 영국 노르폴크 다운함 마크트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Taylor(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1590년 11월 8일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Joan Artys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Goodale nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1568, em Downham Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Taylor, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Artys em 8 de novembro de 1590, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Goodale родился 16 августа 1568 г. в местности доунам маркет, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Taylor, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Artys 8 ноября 1590 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Goodale nació el 16 de agosto de 1568, en Downham Market, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Claypool Goodale, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Taylor, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Artys el 8 de noviembre de 1590, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
